```{r}
#| include: false
#| warning: false
summary_text <- read_ml_summary()
```

## Row

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(bslib)
library(bsicons)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)

# Load data
open_counts <- read_csv("data/open_counts.csv", col_types = cols(
  date = col_date(),
  open_issues = col_integer(),
  open_prs = col_integer()
))

month_ago_date <- max(open_counts$date) %m-% months(1)

current_issues <- open_counts %>%
  filter(date == max(date)) %>%
  pull(open_issues)

month_ago_issues <- open_counts %>%
  filter(date == month_ago_date) %>%
  pull(open_issues)

current_prs <- open_counts %>%
  filter(date == max(date)) %>%
  pull(open_prs)

month_ago_prs <- open_counts %>%
  filter(date == month_ago_date) %>%
  pull(open_prs)

change_issues <- current_issues - month_ago_issues
change_prs <- current_prs - month_ago_prs

get_sign_string <- function(x){
  switch (as.character(sign(x)),
    "1" = paste0("+", x),
    "0" = paste0("+", x),
    "-1" = paste(x),
    ""
  )
}
```

```{r}
value_box(
  title = "Open Issues (and change since 1 month ago)",
  showcase = bsicons::bs_icon("chat"),
  theme = "primary",
  value = glue::glue("{current_issues} ({get_sign_string(change_issues)})")
)
```

```{r}
value_box(
  title = "Open PRs (and change since 1 month ago)",
  showcase = bsicons::bs_icon("pencil"),
  theme = "primary",
  value = glue::glue("{current_prs} ({get_sign_string(change_prs)})")
)
```

## Row

### Column {width=60%}

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| include: false

pr_details <- arrow::read_parquet("data/cache/pr_details.parquet")
issue_details <- arrow::read_parquet("data/cache/issue_details.parquet")

pr_activity <- bind_rows(
  pr_details |>
    mutate(date = floor_date(as.Date(created_at), "month"), type = "Opened") |>
    count(date, type, name = "n"),
  pr_details |>
    filter(!is.na(merged_at)) |>
    mutate(date = floor_date(as.Date(merged_at), "month"), type = "Merged") |>
    count(date, type, name = "n")
) |>
  filter(date >= floor_date(Sys.Date() - years(2), "month")) |>
  filter(date < floor_date(Sys.Date(), "month"))

issue_activity <- bind_rows(
  issue_details |>
    mutate(date = floor_date(as.Date(created_at), "month"), type = "Opened") |>
    count(date, type, name = "n"),
  issue_details |>
    filter(state == "closed") |>
    mutate(date = floor_date(as.Date(closed_at), "month"), type = "Closed") |>
    count(date, type, name = "n")
) |>
  filter(date >= floor_date(Sys.Date() - years(2), "month")) |>
  filter(date < floor_date(Sys.Date(), "month"))
```

::: {.card title="Activity Trends (2 years)"}
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 4

library(patchwork)

p1 <- ggplot(pr_activity, aes(x = date, y = n, colour = type)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = "Actual"), linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(aes(linetype = "Trend"), method = "loess", span = 0.6, se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "6 months", date_labels = "%b %Y") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("Opened" = "#4C72B0", "Merged" = "#59A14F"),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c("Actual" = "solid", "Trend" = "dotted"),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  labs(title = "PRs: opened vs merged", x = NULL, y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

p2 <- ggplot(issue_activity, aes(x = date, y = n, colour = type)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = "Actual"), linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(aes(linetype = "Trend"), method = "loess", span = 0.6, se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "6 months", date_labels = "%b %Y") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("Opened" = "#E15759", "Closed" = "#59A14F"),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c("Actual" = "solid", "Trend" = "dotted"),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  labs(title = "Issues: opened vs closed", x = NULL, y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

p1 + p2
```
:::

### Column {width=40%}

::: {.card title="Dev Mailing List: LLM-generated summary of this month's activity"}
`r summary_text`
:::
